title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you got so many! You really can do it when
you try!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'll take good care of them! Seeing as
you went to all this trouble and—

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Um, I mean, thanks or whatever. Hmph.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now, where should I put them? I'll need one by
my bedside, obviously, and another on my desk...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, let's put one in your office too! Then we'll
matc—I mean, it'll be like a souvenir!
